import { Module } from "module"; import { TransformOptions, JITIOptions, JITIImportOptions } from "./types"; export type { JITIOptions, TransformOptions } from "./types"; type Require = typeof require; type Module = typeof module; type ModuleCache = Record<string, Module>; export type EvalModuleOptions = Partial<{ id: string; filename: string; ext: string; cache: ModuleCache; }>; export interface JITI extends Require { transform: (opts: TransformOptions) => string; register: () => () => void; evalModule: (source: string, options?: EvalModuleOptions) => unknown; /** @experimental Behavior of `jiti.import` might change in the future. */ import: (id: string, importOptions: JITIImportOptions) => Promise<unknown>; } export default function createJITI(_filename: string, opts?: JITIOptions, parentModule?: Module, parentCache?: ModuleCache): JITI;
